embeds.title: Morimens 忘卻前夜 - Alert 5 Doll Boss - Uvhash/Goliath All STR ...
embeds.description: Morimens 7/07/25 Wave 2 Alert 5 Boss. I felt inspired to try this out because I thought the boss would be a really bad matchup for Uvhash, which might make it entertaining. Made quite a lot of mistakes on the run, but who needs to know that when you have 3000 STR and 3 braincells?
